reasoning: The control 3.14.1 focuses on identifying, reporting, and correcting system flaws in a timely manner. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring vulnerabilities are scanned and reported through admission controllers and image scanning. Additionally, audit logging helps in identifying and reporting issues, while ensuring the API server is up-to-date with security patches addresses the correction of flaws.
title: 3_14_1: 3.14.1 Identify, report, and correct system flaws in a timely manner
